name: Broccoli and Mushroom Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook broccoli until tender-crisp (about 3 minutes). Drain and rinse under cold water.
2. Heat oil in a nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add garlic, onion, and mushrooms; cook until the onion is tender.
3. Remove from heat and let cool.
4. In a blender, combine cottage cheese and yogurt. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Blend just until smooth. Cover and refrigerate.
6. Makes 2 1/2 cups.
Per serving: 12 calories; 0.5 grams fat; 0 cholesterol; 22 milligrams sodium.
